title: Staff Firmware Engineer
description:
Summary:
The organization is a stealth neurotechnology company at an early stage. Candidates will join a collaborative engineering team where contributions have visible impact on product development.

The Role:
As a Firmware Engineer, you will be part of a small, technically skilled team actively developing products. Initial responsibilities involve learning a complex codebase, then progressively taking on greater accountability for firmware creation, testing, and documentation. Work is hands-on from day one, involving sophisticated embedded systems and open technical challenges. The role includes writing production-grade embedded code, interfacing with wireless hardware, and collaborating with electrical and software teams. As projects mature, documentation and validation work grows significantly.

Key Requirements:
- 6+ years of professional industry experience
- Advanced embedded C expertise from real production environments
- Firmware development for IoT or connected devices
- ARM Cortex-M microcontroller proficiency
- Understanding of RTOS and bare-metal development approaches
- R&D or early-stage product environment experience
- Medical device development background

The company supports visa sponsorship for qualified candidates. Benefits include 401(k), medical, vision, and dental insurance, plus commuter benefits.
